{% extends "!footer.html" %} {# Override the copyright line so "sronilsson" links to the author's site. The theme HTML-escapes the `copyright` string, so a link can't live in conf.py's copyright value — it has to go in the template. The year is still taken from conf.py (copyright = ", sronilsson"). Build/revision/ last-updated spans are preserved from the stock theme. #} {% block contentinfo %}

{%- if show_copyright %} © Copyright {{ copyright.split(',')[0] }}, sronilsson. {%- endif %} {%- if build_id and build_url %} {%- trans %}Build{% endtrans -%} {{ build_id }}. {%- elif commit %} {%- trans %}Revision{% endtrans %} {{ commit }}. {%- endif %} {%- if last_updated %} {%- trans last_updated=last_updated|e %}Last updated on {{ last_updated }}.{% endtrans %} {%- endif -%}

{% endblock %}
